message:
feat(robot): add search/robot-search with hybrid scoring and ranking presets

Implements --search/--robot-search with text and hybrid scoring modes,
5 presets (default, bug-hunting, sprint-planning, impact-first, text-only),
custom weight JSON override, short-query weight adjustment, exact ID match
promotion, and lexical boost. Adds parse_timestamp_ms_pub to causal module.

All 10 search unit tests pass.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -278,6 +278,24 @@ pub struct Cli {
     #[arg(long, action = ArgAction::SetTrue)]
     pub robot_drift: bool,
 
+    #[arg(long)]
+    pub search: Option<String>,
+
+    #[arg(long, action = ArgAction::SetTrue)]
+    pub robot_search: bool,
+
+    #[arg(long, default_value_t = 10)]
+    pub search_limit: usize,
+
+    #[arg(long)]
+    pub search_mode: Option<String>,
+
+    #[arg(long)]
+    pub search_preset: Option<String>,
+
+    #[arg(long)]
+    pub search_weights: Option<String>,
+
     #[arg(long)]
     pub export_md: Option<PathBuf>,
 
@@ -340,5 +358,6 @@ impl Cli {
             || self.robot_causality.is_some()
             || self.save_baseline.is_some()
             || self.robot_drift
+            || self.robot_search
     }
 }
